MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT CYRUS LAFARRE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT's Motion For Summary Judgment is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and produce admissible competent evidence as to the recordation of exemption. Automatic exemption does not apply to foreclosures. Spencer v. Lowery (1191) 235 Cal.App.3d 1636.Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)
